source: Single verified smoothed sunspot number captured during the 2026-06-10 voacapl grounding run. NOT a forecast table. The operator extends this with authoritative SWPC monthly smoothed-SSN values (https://www.swpc.noaa.gov/products/predicted-sunspot-number-and-radio-flux) before relying on out-of-month predictions; until then the fallback serves this verified value (stale, but real — not fabricated).
